tasks.name: Member Management UI
tasks.description: Build UI for adding/removing project members. Data model already exists with 'members' array in projects collection.
acceptanceCriteria: Add members button on project settings page
Modal to search and add users by email
List of current members with remove option
Members can view but not edit project
tasks.technicalNotes: Use existing useProjectMutations hook, add updateMembers function

tasks.name: Drag & Drop Suite Reordering
tasks.description: Implement drag and drop reordering for test suites. Order field exists in data model.
acceptanceCriteria: Suites can be reordered via drag and drop
tasks.technicalNotes: Use @dnd-kit/core or react-beautiful-dnd. reorderSuites mutation already exists.

tasks.name: Nested Suites UI
tasks.description: Implement nested/hierarchical suites view. parentSuiteId field exists in data model.
tasks.technicalNotes: Build recursive SuiteTree component

tasks.name: Batch Operations
tasks.description: Implement batch delete/move for test cases
tasks.technicalNotes: Add batch operations to useTestCaseMutations

tasks.name: Compact UI overhaul for Test Cases & Suites
tasks.description: Refactor the test case and suite management UI into high-density list views for better scalability.
acceptanceCriteria: High-density grid/list view for test cases
High-density list view for test suites
Improved filtering and navigation for large data sets
Compact modals for creation and editing
tasks.technicalNotes: Redesign pages using a consistent high-density layout system.

tasks.name: Assertion Actions
tasks.description: Implement assertion action types in executor (visible, hidden, text, value, url, title)
tasks.technicalNotes: Extend executeStep function in the server executor path

tasks.name: Direct CLI Test Execution
tasks.description: Removed after consolidating execution into the Next.js server executor
tasks.technicalNotes: No longer applicable after removing the standalone runner workspace

tasks.name: Screenshot on Failure
tasks.description: Capture screenshot when a step fails during execution
acceptanceCriteria: Screenshot URL saved in test run logs
tasks.technicalNotes: Use page.screenshot() in Playwright, upload via Firebase Admin SDK

tasks.name: Video Recording
tasks.description: Record video of test execution
acceptanceCriteria: Video recorded for each test run
tasks.technicalNotes: Use Playwright's video recording option in browser context

tasks.name: Console Logs Capture
tasks.description: Capture browser console logs during test execution
tasks.technicalNotes: Use page.on('console') event in Playwright

tasks.name: Pass/Fail Charts
tasks.description: Create pass/fail breakdown chart for test runs
tasks.technicalNotes: Use recharts or chart.js library

tasks.name: Duration Charts
tasks.description: Create test duration charts over time
acceptanceCriteria: Line chart showing test duration trends
tasks.technicalNotes: Aggregate durations from testRuns collection

tasks.name: Trend Graphs
tasks.description: Show pass rate trends over time
acceptanceCriteria: Line graph showing pass rate over time
tasks.technicalNotes: Query testRuns with date grouping

tasks.name: Flaky Test Detection
tasks.description: Identify tests that sometimes pass and sometimes fail
tasks.technicalNotes: Analyze last N runs per test case, calculate pass/fail variance

tasks.name: Screenshot Gallery
tasks.description: Image gallery for failure screenshots
tasks.technicalNotes: Simple lightbox component

tasks.name: Video Playback UI

acceptanceCriteria: Video player on run details page
tasks.technicalNotes: Use native video element or react-player

tasks.name: PDF Report Export
tasks.description: Export test run results as PDF
acceptanceCriteria: Export button on test runs page
tasks.technicalNotes: Use @react-pdf/renderer or jsPDF

tasks.name: CSV Export
tasks.description: Export test results as CSV
acceptanceCriteria: Export test run results to CSV
tasks.technicalNotes: Simple CSV generation, trigger download

tasks.name: JSON Export
tasks.description: Export test data as JSON

tasks.name: Dashboard Recent Runs Widget
tasks.description: Widget showing recent test runs on project dashboard
tasks.technicalNotes: Reuse useTestRuns hook

tasks.name: Dashboard Pass Rate Widget
tasks.description: Widget showing overall pass rate
tasks.technicalNotes: Calculate from recent runs

tasks.name: Dashboard Slowest Tests Widget
tasks.description: Widget showing slowest running tests
tasks.technicalNotes: Aggregate durations, sort desc

tasks.name: Dashboard Failing Tests Widget
tasks.description: Widget showing most frequently failing tests

tasks.name: Default Test Run Naming
tasks.description: Add default naming for test runs with timestamps when triggered.
acceptanceCriteria: Test runs are automatically named 'Run - YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm' if no name provided
The name is stored in Firestore and displayed in the UI
tasks.technicalNotes: Update useTestRun hook and testRuns collection schema

tasks.name: Run Logs in List View
tasks.description: Show execution logs directly in the test runs list via expandable rows.
acceptanceCriteria: Expand/collapse button on test run rows
Supports both single cases and suites
tasks.technicalNotes: Refactor Expandable Row in TestRunsPage

tasks.name: Fix auth redirection on base URL
tasks.description: Automatically redirect authenticated users from base URL and login/signup to dashboard

tasks.name: Elaborate Test Result Reports
tasks.description: Implement a detailed, shareable report view for test runs with failure reasons.
acceptanceCriteria: Dedicated page for test run details (/projects/[projectId]/test-runs/[runId])
Prominent display of failure reasons with logs
tasks.technicalNotes: Create new dynamic route for test run details, move logs view to a more elaborate component

tasks.name: Single Atomic Suite Runs
tasks.description: Trigger all tests in a suite as a single atomic run to prevent UI clutter and resource exhaustion.
acceptanceCriteria: Running a suite creates ONE record in the history
Runner processes suite tests sequentially/in parallel responsibly
UI allows expanding suite results to see individual test steps
tasks.technicalNotes: Updated TestRun schema to include 'results' array and 'type' field.

tasks.name: High Density Test Runs UI
tasks.description: Refactor the test runs history and detail views for high density and scalability.
acceptanceCriteria: Nested/expandable results in run detail view
tasks.technicalNotes: Implement new grid layout and nested expansion components.

tasks.name: Data-Driven Testing
tasks.description: Run same test with multiple data sets
acceptanceCriteria: Define data sets for test case
Run test iterates over data sets
Results show per data set iteration
tasks.technicalNotes: Add dataSets field to test case, loop in executor

tasks.name: Scheduled Runs
tasks.description: Schedule tests to run at specific times
acceptanceCriteria: Schedule a test/suite to run at time
Cloud Function triggers at scheduled time
tasks.technicalNotes: Use Firebase Cloud Functions with scheduling

tasks.name: Recurring Schedules
tasks.description: Set up recurring test schedules (daily, weekly)
tasks.technicalNotes: Store cron expressions, Cloud Scheduler

tasks.name: Email Notifications
tasks.description: Send email on test failure
tasks.technicalNotes: Use SendGrid or Firebase Extension for email

tasks.description: Send Slack messages on test events
tasks.technicalNotes: Use Slack incoming webhooks

tasks.name: Webhook Callbacks
tasks.description: HTTP webhook on test completion
tasks.technicalNotes: Cloud Function POST to configured URL

tasks.name: Test Case Comments
tasks.description: Add comments/discussions to test cases
tasks.technicalNotes: Sub-collection 'comments' under testCases

tasks.name: Activity History
tasks.description: Track and display activity log
tasks.technicalNotes: Create 'activities' collection, log via hooks

tasks.name: Team Permissions

acceptanceCriteria: Define roles: owner, admin, member, viewer
tasks.technicalNotes: Add 'role' to member data, check in Firestore rules

tasks.description: Link test cases to Jira tickets

Show linked issues on test case

tasks.name: Coverage Visualization
tasks.description: Visualize test coverage of features/requirements

acceptanceCriteria: Include all test case data and steps

tasks.name: Draft Test Case Data Model
tasks.description: Update Firestore schema to support draft test cases, which are not yet part of the main suite execution.
acceptanceCriteria: Draft test cases collection or status field
Drafts are linked to a suite but status is 'draft'
Drafts do not show up in runner
tasks.technicalNotes: Add 'status' field to TestCase interface ('active' | 'draft'). Default to 'active'.

tasks.name: AI Test Generator Backend
tasks.description: Backend function to accept URL, scrape content, and prompt LLM to generate test cases
acceptanceCriteria: Cloud Function / API Endpoint to accept URL
Returns valid JSON test case structure
tasks.technicalNotes: Use LangChain or direct API. Prompt engineering for robust step generation. Mock response for now if API key missing.

tasks.name: AI Generation UI
tasks.description: UI modal to input URL and trigger AI generation
acceptanceCriteria: Button in Test Suite view 'Generate with AI'
Modal to enter Feature URL and optional instructions
tasks.technicalNotes: Call API endpoint, show progress

tasks.name: Draft Review UI
tasks.description: Interface to review generated drafts, edit them, and confirm/discard
acceptanceCriteria: One-click confirm to promote to active test case
tasks.technicalNotes: Separate section in Suite Detail or dedicated Review Mode

tasks.name: External AI Import API
tasks.description: API endpoint to accept JSON test cases from external AIs, validate the format, and create test cases in Firestore
acceptanceCriteria: POST endpoint at /api/import/json accepts test case JSON
Returns validation errors with helpful messages
Creates test cases in Firestore with 'draft' status
Supports single test case or array of test cases
tasks.technicalNotes: Use Zod for validation. Reuse existing test case creation logic. Accept flexible JSON format and transform to internal schema.

tasks.name: External AI Import UI
tasks.description: Modal interface for users to paste JSON test cases from external AIs
acceptanceCriteria: Button 'Import AI Tests' in test cases/suites page
Modal with large textarea for JSON paste
Preview of tests to import before confirmation
Success message showing number of tests imported
tasks.technicalNotes: Create ImportJSONModal component. Show validation errors inline. Allow selecting target suite.

tasks.name: JSON Format Helpers & Examples
tasks.description: Provide JSON format documentation and example prompts for external AIs
acceptanceCriteria: Show example JSON format in import modal
tasks.technicalNotes: Create prompt templates that generate compatible JSON. Add format documentation panel in modal.
